Off Calendar Feb-25-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE ORIENT's Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion is granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.
